text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
E-e-excuse me, Rob Roy! Um, would you<n>happen
to be looking for a bookmark?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
W-well, I was in town the other day<n>when I just
happened to spot you ahead<n>of me, and you
dropped your bookmark<n>in that very same
moment...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I picked it up right away and tried to<n>catch up to
you, but I lost you in the<n>crowd! S-so I held onto
it until I could<n>give it back...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
O-oh, so that's where it went! Thank you<n>for
keeping it safe for me.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
But I'm surprised you recognized me just<n>from
seeing my back. There's not much<n>about me that
stands out...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Your dark, shiny ears and your tail were<n>shining a
glorious light! And you looked<n>like a great scholar
holding your book!<n>How could anyone miss such a
splendid<n>Umamusume?!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Wh... what? I don't know what you're<n>talking
about. What light? A scholar?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
You flatter me! Hehe. ♪ "The wise<n>scholar of
light" sounds like a heroic<n>tale!
